hero_subtitle: SFTY supports regulated digital asset businesses with controlled, audit-ready deployment phases that preserve governance integrity and streamline compliance workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance control falters without phased rollout
problem_description: Enterprise digital asset teams face operational risk and audit gaps when deploying compliance tools in a single disruptive phase. Without structured implementation, manual workflows and incomplete evidence slow regulatory readiness and weaken institutional trust.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY enables enterprise teams to deploy compliance workflows, audit evidence, role-based access and case management incrementally, supporting controlled implementation without operational disruption or gaps in regulatory readiness.
workflow_title: From phased onboarding to audit-ready compliance
workflow_description: SFTY guides provider checks through risk-based routing, review, decision logging and evidence preservation to support phased compliance implementation for VASPs.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another rollout. Controlled phased deployment
why_sfty_description: SFTY delivers a provider-neutral compliance layer that supports phased implementation with role-based access, audit logs, evidence preservation, and operational control across workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs deploying compliance controls incrementally with audit-ready evidence, provider orchestration, bank due diligence and enterprise-grade governance from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support phased compliance implementation workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how phased onboarding improves compliance team efficiency
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved during rollout phases

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams with a connected operational layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, case management, and reporting into one scalable workflow.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support phased implementation?
faq_2_answer: SFTY enables controlled phased rollouts, allowing teams to connect selected providers, configure roles, set rules, and add features incrementally without disrupting existing workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and traceability across compliance reviews and reporting workflows.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured workflows without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace compliance tools but acts as a compliance control layer that connects and structures outputs from existing providers into actionable workflows.
final_title: Review phased compliance deployment with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports controlled rollout, governance, audit evidence and role-based access for VASP enterprise readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
